ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key. Required when LLM_PROVIDER=anthropic (the default).

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key. Required when LLM_PROVIDER=openai.

CONTENTDRIPS_API_KEY.description: ContentDrips API key used to render slide images.

CONTENTDRIPS_TEMPLATE_ID.description: ContentDrips template ID that defines the carousel visual layout.

CONTENTDRIPS_API_BASE.description: Base URL for the ContentDrips API. Defaults to https://generate.contentdrips.com if unset.
